originalAlarm.description: The right operand of '+' is a garbage value

sanitizedDescription: The right operand of '+' is a garbage value
reasoning: 95755181b82.c L39: 'Right operand of + is garbage' in `iobuf + len`. PC simplifies to !__need___FILE (the __STRICT_ANSI__ OR-branches cancel out). Only a stdio.h library macro, no feature config flags. len is initialized unconditionally at L25-26, so it is never garbage. Same desugaring artifact pattern as TRANSFORMATION_17.
